title: Diploma in Theological Studies
description: A two-year intensive diploma providing a solid biblical and theological base for various ministry roles.
fullDescription: The Diploma in Theological Studies (D.T.S.) is an intermediate program for individuals who desire more than a certificate but are not ready for a full four-year degree. It covers the core essentials of biblical survey, doctrine, and church history.
objectives: Establish a firm grasp of the metanarrative of Scripture.
Understand the core tenets of the Westminster Standards.
Learn the fundamentals of teaching and communicating biblical truth.
Identify the major turning points in the history of the Christian Church.
admissionRequirements: Successful completion of the PBSI entrance interview
